LOW_VOL_HIGH_BULLISH.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
LOW_VOL_HIGH_BULLISH.rationale: LOW_VOL + BULLISH but IV=HIGH (IVP=75) — vol expansion signal in low-vol regime; DIAGONAL short leg exposed

LOW_VOL_HIGH_NEUTRAL.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
LOW_VOL_HIGH_NEUTRAL.rationale: LOW_VOL + NEUTRAL but IVP=75 outside 20–50 — Iron Condor risk/reward unfavourable

LOW_VOL_HIGH_BEARISH.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
LOW_VOL_HIGH_BEARISH.rationale: LOW_VOL + BEARISH — 低波动环境中的方向性看跌无统计边际；V型反转概率高，等待趋势确认

LOW_VOL_NEUTRAL_BULLISH.size_rule: Full size — risk ≤ 4.5% of account (signals agree + VIX flat/falling)
LOW_VOL_NEUTRAL_BULLISH.rationale: LOW_VOL + BULLISH — theta is cheap; use 45 DTE short leg to widen collection window

LOW_VOL_NEUTRAL_NEUTRAL.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
LOW_VOL_NEUTRAL_NEUTRAL.rationale: LOW_VOL + NEUTRAL but IVP=55 outside 20–50 — Iron Condor risk/reward unfavourable

LOW_VOL_NEUTRAL_BEARISH.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
LOW_VOL_NEUTRAL_BEARISH.rationale: LOW_VOL + BEARISH — 低波动环境中的方向性看跌无统计边际；V型反转概率高，等待趋势确认

LOW_VOL_LOW_BULLISH.size_rule: Half size — risk ≤ 2.25% of account (VIX rising or signals mixed)
LOW_VOL_LOW_BULLISH.rationale: LOW_VOL + BULLISH — theta is cheap; use 45 DTE short leg to widen collection window

LOW_VOL_LOW_NEUTRAL.size_rule: Half size — risk ≤ 2.25% of account (VIX rising or signals mixed)
LOW_VOL_LOW_NEUTRAL.rationale: LOW_VOL + NEUTRAL — range-bound market; 16-delta wings give ~70% PoP

LOW_VOL_LOW_BEARISH.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
LOW_VOL_LOW_BEARISH.rationale: LOW_VOL + BEARISH — 低波动环境中的方向性看跌无统计边际；V型反转概率高，等待趋势确认

NORMAL_HIGH_BULLISH.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
NORMAL_HIGH_BULLISH.rationale: NORMAL + IV HIGH + BULLISH — no strategy has statistically significant alpha in this cell; REDUCE_WAIT (SPEC-060)

NORMAL_HIGH_NEUTRAL.size_rule: Full size — risk ≤ 4.5% of account (signals agree + VIX flat/falling)
NORMAL_HIGH_NEUTRAL.rationale: NORMAL + IV HIGH + NEUTRAL — rich premium + no directional edge: Iron Condor

NORMAL_HIGH_BEARISH.size_rule: Full size — risk ≤ 4.5% of account (signals agree + VIX flat/falling)
NORMAL_HIGH_BEARISH.rationale: NORMAL + IV HIGH + BEARISH — MA50 lag means downtrend confirmed; IC collects from both sides without directional bet

NORMAL_NEUTRAL_BULLISH.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
NORMAL_NEUTRAL_BULLISH.rationale: NORMAL + IV NEUTRAL + BULLISH but IVP=55 ≥ 55 — stressed vol environment, BPS tail risk too high

NORMAL_NEUTRAL_NEUTRAL.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
NORMAL_NEUTRAL_NEUTRAL.rationale: NORMAL + IV NEUTRAL + NEUTRAL but IVP=55 outside 20–50 — Iron Condor risk/reward unfavourable

NORMAL_NEUTRAL_BEARISH.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
NORMAL_NEUTRAL_BEARISH.rationale: NORMAL + IV NEUTRAL + BEARISH but IVP=55 outside 20–50 — IC risk/reward unfavourable

NORMAL_LOW_NEUTRAL.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
NORMAL_LOW_NEUTRAL.rationale: NORMAL + IV LOW + NEUTRAL — no directional edge and premium cheap; skip

NORMAL_LOW_BEARISH.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
NORMAL_LOW_BEARISH.rationale: NORMAL + IV LOW + BEARISH — low premium insufficient for IC; skip

HIGH_VOL_HIGH_BULLISH.size_rule: 50% size — risk ≤ 0.8% of account (HIGH_VOL, reduced exposure)
HIGH_VOL_HIGH_BULLISH.rationale: HIGH_VOL (22≤VIX<35) — elevated premium offsets risk; tighter params (δ0.2, 35DTE, 50% size)

HIGH_VOL_HIGH_NEUTRAL.size_rule: 50% size — risk ≤ 0.8% of account (HIGH_VOL, reduced exposure)
HIGH_VOL_HIGH_NEUTRAL.rationale: HIGH_VOL + NEUTRAL + VIX stable — inflated premium on both sides; symmetric IC captures vol risk premium without directional bet

HIGH_VOL_HIGH_BEARISH.size_rule: Hold cash; re-evaluate when conditions improve
HIGH_VOL_HIGH_BEARISH.rationale: HIGH_VOL + BEARISH but ivp63=75 >= 70 — VIX at 63-day high; mean reversion risk too elevated for BCS_HV short call

HIGH_VOL_NEUTRAL_BULLISH.size_rule: 50% size — risk ≤ 0.8% of account (HIGH_VOL, reduced exposure)
HIGH_VOL_NEUTRAL_BULLISH.rationale: HIGH_VOL + BULLISH + IV NEUTRAL + VIX stable — IC_HV dominates BPS_HV in this cell; double-sided premium with no directional bet (SPEC-060)

HIGH_VOL_NEUTRAL_NEUTRAL.size_rule: 50% size — risk ≤ 0.8% of account (HIGH_VOL, reduced exposure)
HIGH_VOL_NEUTRAL_NEUTRAL.rationale: HIGH_VOL + NEUTRAL + VIX stable — inflated premium on both sides; symmetric IC captures vol risk premium without directional bet

HIGH_VOL_NEUTRAL_BEARISH.size_rule: 50% size — risk ≤ 0.8% of account (HIGH_VOL BEARISH, reduced exposure)
HIGH_VOL_NEUTRAL_BEARISH.rationale: HIGH_VOL + BEARISH + VIX stable — inflated call premium with directional tailwind; δ0.20 short call has high PoP

HIGH_VOL_LOW_BULLISH.size_rule: 50% size — risk ≤ 0.8% of account (HIGH_VOL, reduced exposure)
HIGH_VOL_LOW_BULLISH.rationale: HIGH_VOL (22≤VIX<35) — elevated premium offsets risk; tighter params (δ0.2, 35DTE, 50% size)

HIGH_VOL_LOW_NEUTRAL.size_rule: 50% size — risk ≤ 0.8% of account (HIGH_VOL, reduced exposure)
HIGH_VOL_LOW_NEUTRAL.rationale: HIGH_VOL + NEUTRAL + VIX stable — inflated premium on both sides; symmetric IC captures vol risk premium without directional bet

HIGH_VOL_LOW_BEARISH.size_rule: 50% size — risk ≤ 0.8% of account (HIGH_VOL BEARISH, reduced exposure)
HIGH_VOL_LOW_BEARISH.rationale: HIGH_VOL + BEARISH + VIX stable — inflated call premium with directional tailwind; δ0.20 short call has high PoP

EXTREME_VOL_HIGH_BULLISH.rationale: EXTREME_VOL (VIX ≥ 35) — tail risk too elevated; hold cash
